prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **H22A4** (2.2L DOHC VTEC, 200hp stock) with a **Hasport Performance BB6-specific motor mount kit** and **K-Tuned H22A4 header** for optimized exhaust scavenging, paired with a **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** and **RC Engineering 750cc fuel injectors** for high-RPM fueling.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.63 A/R, 56 trim) on a **Custom Spec BB6 turbo manifold** (TIG-welded 304 stainless steel, equal-length runners), mated to a **GReddy Type-S intercooler** (front-mount, 600hp capacity) and **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** with **TurboSmart Kompact 50mm blow-off valve**. Supporting mods include a **Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump**, **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor**, and **Hondata KPro ECU reflash** (v4, BB6-specific base map).

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (BB6-specific valving, 2-way adjustable damping), **Whiteline BB6 rear sway bar** (24mm adjustable), **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** (full set, including rear trailing arm bushings), and **Project K Sport BB6-specific camber arms** (adjustable front and rear). Braking upgraded to **StopTech BB6 big brake kit** (4-piston calipers, 328mm rotors) with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 BB6 widebody kit** (FRP construction, bolt-on fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and rear diffuser), painted in **PPG Honda Championship White (NH-578M)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and mirrors for contrast.

Custom **J's Racing BB6 front lip spoiler** (carbon fiber, 3-piece design) and **C-West BB6 rear wing** (dual-element, adjustable angle, carbon fiber construction) with **Seibon Carbon BB6 hood** (vented, 50% weight reduction). Lighting upgraded to **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (HID projector retrofit) and **Depo Racing JDM-spec taillights** (clear lens, sequential turn signals).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats** (BB6-specific mounting brackets), **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub** (with **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel**), and **Defi Advance BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, and water temp) mounted on a **Custom Spec BB6 A-pillar pod**. Full sound deadening with **Dynamat Xtreme** and **Honda K-Series shift knob** (short throw, weighted).
